title: Sara as toddler, first steps with Joe
prompt: Wide three-shot inside the cozy anniversary living room — twinkling fairy lights, beige sectional couch in soft background, autumn-orange throw blanket. @young_Mama kneeling on the floor at left with arms OUT in catch-position. @young_Papa kneeling at right with arms also OUT. @baby_Sara stands in the middle on wobbly legs. @Joe sits at the toddler's left side looking up supportively. Right LEG STEPS forward bravely, tiny ARMS OUT for balance, mouth GIGGLES happy. Pomeranian tail WAGS faster. Wobble-runs into the left open arms. Clapping in encouragement from the right. Pomeranian LICKS the tiny hand once. young_Mama (joyful): "You did it!"
